items.caption: A black mail slot with gold accents, mounted on a beige wall. the slot has a gold-colored crown-like emblem at the top and the room number "12032" in gold lettering below it. the style of the mail slot suggests a luxurious setting, possibly a hotel, as indicated by the reference to the venetian macao resort hotel. the slot is designed to be accessible, with a small indentation at the bottom for inserting mail.
